description_long: This house consists of two modern, rectangular residential units joined by a shared flat roof structure at the rear, with a tennis court or large patio area extending behind them. The exterior features a striking contrast of black and white surfaces, with large vertical and horizontal windows distributed asymmetrically across the facades. Each unit has a private outdoor terrace or garden space at the back, partially covered by a pergola or awning. The front facades are characterized by tall, narrow windows and recessed entryways, while the rear showcases expansive glass doors opening onto the terraces. The roof is flat and accessible, possibly serving as an additional outdoor living area. The overall design is minimalist and geometric, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A pair of modern, black-and-white rectangular houses with flat roofs, large windows, and private rear terraces, connected by a shared structure and adjacent to a tennis court or patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing two black-and-white houses with tall, narrow windows and recessed entryways.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the houses, the flat roof, and the connection to the large patio or tennis court.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private terraces, pergolas, and the full expanse of the adjacent tennis court or patio.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid black exterior walls and the relationship between the houses and the court area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical and horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryways with tall doors, minimal overhang, and no visible porch or decorative columns
